rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §21.903 governs a teacher preparation program and references funding under Educ. Code §48.157; it contains no provision tied to homestead exemption values.
quote: Sec. 21.903. PREPARING AND RETAINING EDUCATORS THROUGH PARTNERSHIP TRADITIONAL PRESERVICE PROGRAM.
_note: No textual or conceptual nexus between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator preparation statute.
